# Triangulation in TDD and the Rule of Three

How to earn abstractions instead of guessing them.

## 1. Triangulation

Triangulation is a brake on premature abstraction.

## 2. Rule of Three

The second example often says a constant is not enough.
The third example usually clarifies the stable rule.

## 3. Practical workflow

- Write one concrete test.
- Add a case that forces a shape change.
- Refactor only after green.
